Uses of Enum Class
uno.anahata.asi.agi.message.Role

Packages that use Role
Package
Description
uno.anahata.asi.agi.message
Provides the core message and part domain primitives for the Anahata AI framework.
uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi
Provides the core UI orchestration components for individual AGI sessions.

  • Uses of Role in uno.anahata.asi.agi.message

    Subclasses with type arguments of type Role in uno.anahata.asi.agi.message
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    enum 
    Role
    Defines the role of the entity that created a message, providing a type-safe way to distinguish between user, model, and tool messages.
    Methods in uno.anahata.asi.agi.message that return Role
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    abstract Role
    AbstractMessage.getRole()
    Gets the role of the entity that created this message.
    Role
    AbstractModelMessage.getRole()
    Gets the role of the entity that created this message.
    Role
    UserMessage.getRole()
    Gets the role of the entity that created this message.
    static Role
    Role.valueOf(String name)
    Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name.
    static Role[]
    Role.values()
    Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.

  • Uses of Role in uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi

    Methods in uno.anahata.asi.swing.agi with parameters of type Role
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Color
    SwingAgiConfig.UITheme.getBorderColor(Role role)
    Gets the border color for a message panel based on the role.
    Color
    SwingAgiConfig.UITheme.getHeaderEndColor(Role role)
    Gets the background color for the end of a message header (and content area) based on the role.
    Color
    SwingAgiConfig.UITheme.getHeaderForegroundColor(Role role)
    Gets the foreground (text) color for a message header based on the role.
    Color
    SwingAgiConfig.UITheme.getHeaderStartColor(Role role)
    Gets the background color for the start of a message header based on the role.
